name: 1st Place Auto Dallas
description_short: 1st Place Auto Dallas is a credit repair provider based in Dallas, Texas. Rated 4.7/5 with 411 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
1st Place Auto Dallas is a credit repair provider serving clients in Dallas, Texas. With 411 Google reviews and a 4.7/5.0 rating, 1st Place Auto Dallas has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

1st Place Auto Dallas specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Dallas, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. 1st Place Auto Dallas operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Dallas, Texas area who are considering 1st Place Auto Dallas should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.
